---
title: "Лабораторна робота №3"
author: "Здобувач вищої освіти групи КІ-25-1 Болотнікова Милана"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    theme: cosmo
    highlight: tango
---

```{r}
n <- 100
a <- -2
b <- 4
set.seed(123)
x <- runif(n, min = a, max = b)
cat("Перші елементи вибірки:", head(x), "\n")
summary(x)
op <- par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
hist(x, freq = FALSE, col = "lightgray", main = "Histogram", border = 4)
curve(dunif(x, min = a, max = b), add = TRUE, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
plot(ecdf(x), main = "Quantile Plot", verticals = TRUE, col.points = "blue", col.hor = "red", col.vert = "bisque", xlab = "X", ylab = "Fn(x)")
boxplot(x, main = "Box-and-Wisker Plot", col = "lightgray", border = 4, horizontal = TRUE, xlab = "X")
plot(density(x, adjust = 2), main = "density trace", xlab = "X", ylab = "Density", col = "blue")
par(op)
```
